description: SQL Training Pairs for Vanna - Question-SQL Examples

pairs.question: What is the percentage of shareholding of Li Ka-Shing Unity Trustee Company Limited as trustee of The Li Ka-Shing Unity Trust in CK Hutchison?
pairs.sql: SELECT shareholder_name, trust_name, trustee_name, percentage_held FROM shareholdings WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND trustee_name LIKE '%Li Ka-Shing Unity Trustee%' AND trust_name LIKE '%Li Ka-Shing Unity Trust%';

pairs.question: Can you list the executive directors?
pairs.sql: SELECT person_name, person_name_zh, role, committee FROM key_personnel WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND role ILIKE '%Executive Director%' ORDER BY person_name;

pairs.question: What is the percentage of total revenue from Canada?
pairs.sql: SELECT category, percentage, amount, currency FROM revenue_breakdown WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND year = 2023 AND category = 'Canada' AND category_type = 'Region';

pairs.question: What is the % and amount of total revenue from Asia, Australia & Others respectively based on the chart?
pairs.sql: SELECT category, percentage, amount, currency FROM revenue_breakdown WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND year = 2023 AND category IN ('Asia, Australia & Others', 'Asia', 'Australia') AND category_type = 'Region' ORDER BY percentage DESC;

pairs.question: What is the % of total revenue from Asia, Australia & Others? Within Asia, Australia & Others, what is the % of revenue for Retail Sector?
pairs.sql: SELECT category, sub_category, sub_percentage, percentage FROM revenue_breakdown WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND year = 2023 AND category LIKE '%Asia%' AND (sub_category ILIKE '%Retail%' OR category ILIKE '%Retail%');

pairs.question: Please provide the profit and loss figures with 5 comparative periods?
pairs.sql: SELECT year, metric_name, metric_name_zh, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND category IN ('revenue', 'profit', 'loss') AND fiscal_period = 'FY' AND year >= 2019 ORDER BY year DESC, metric_name;

pairs.question: Please provide profit attributable to ordinary shareholders of the company from 2019 – 2023?
pairs.sql: SELECT year, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND metric_name ILIKE '%profit attributable%shareholder%' AND year BETWEEN 2019 AND 2023 AND fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY year;

pairs.question: Please provide revenue figures of the company from 2019 – 2023?
pairs.sql: SELECT year, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND metric_name ILIKE '%revenue%' AND year BETWEEN 2019 AND 2023 AND fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY year;

pairs.question: Please provide fixed assets figures for CK Hutchison from 2019 – 2023
pairs.sql: SELECT year, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND metric_name ILIKE '%fixed asset%' AND year BETWEEN 2019 AND 2023 AND fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY year;

pairs.question: What is the amount of total debt to be matured in 2027?
pairs.sql: SELECT maturity_year, SUM(amount) as total_amount, currency FROM debt_maturity WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND maturity_year = 2027 GROUP BY maturity_year, currency;

pairs.question: What is the amount of cash at bank and in hand for the year 2024 mentioned in SFC Annual Report?
pairs.sql: SELECT year, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name_en ILIKE '%Securities and Futures Commission%' OR name_en ILIKE '%SFC%') AND metric_name ILIKE '%cash at bank%' AND year = 2024;

pairs.question: List all members of the Securities Compensation Fund Committee
pairs.sql: SELECT person_name, person_name_zh, role, committee FROM key_personnel WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name_en ILIKE '%Securities and Futures Commission%' OR name_en ILIKE '%SFC%') AND committee ILIKE '%Securities Compensation Fund%' ORDER BY person_name;

pairs.question: How many floors did SFC purchase for the OIE office?
pairs.sql: SELECT event_title, metric_value, metric_unit FROM specific_events WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name_en ILIKE '%SFC%') AND event_category = 'Property Acquisition' AND event_title ILIKE '%OIE%' OR event_detail ILIKE '%floor%';

pairs.question: When was the effective date of the SEHK GEM listing reform?
pairs.sql: SELECT event_title, effective_date, announcement_date FROM specific_events WHERE event_category = 'Listing Reform' AND event_title ILIKE '%GEM%' ORDER BY effective_date DESC LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: How many listing applications were processed by SFC?
pairs.sql: SELECT year, application_count, approved_count, rejected_count FROM listing_applications WHERE company_id IS NULL ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: When was the consultation on share buy-backs conducted?
pairs.sql: SELECT event_title, announcement_date, effective_date FROM specific_events WHERE event_category = 'Consultation' AND event_title ILIKE '%buy-back%' OR event_detail ILIKE '%share buy-back%' ORDER BY announcement_date DESC;

pairs.question: How many stocks were launched for the RMB counters?
pairs.sql: SELECT event_title, metric_value, metric_unit FROM specific_events WHERE event_category = 'Market Initiative' AND event_title ILIKE '%RMB%' OR event_detail ILIKE '%RMB counter%';

pairs.question: Generate the bio of Lisa Chen mentioned in SFC Annual Report
pairs.sql: SELECT person_name, person_name_zh, role, committee, biography FROM key_personnel WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name_en ILIKE '%SFC%') AND person_name ILIKE '%Lisa Chen%';

pairs.question: Provide the Top 10 stock codes and names of the market capital from the BioTech Sector. The result is shown in a table.
pairs.sql: SELECT c.stock_code, c.name_en as company_name, (m.closing_price * m.issued_shares) as market_capital, m.closing_price, m.issued_shares FROM companies c JOIN market_data m ON c.id = m.company_id WHERE c.sector = 'BioTech' AND m.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM market_data) ORDER BY market_capital DESC LIMIT 10;

pairs.question: Provide the Top 5 stock codes and names with the highest total liabilities in BioTech sector
pairs.sql: SELECT c.stock_code, c.name_en as company_name, fm.standardized_value as total_liabilities, fm.standardized_currency FROM companies c JOIN financial_metrics fm ON c.id = fm.company_id WHERE c.sector = 'BioTech' AND fm.metric_name ILIKE '%Total Liabilities%' AND fm.year = 2024 AND fm.fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY fm.standardized_value DESC LIMIT 5;
pairs.note: Uses standardized_value for correct cross-company comparison. Raw 'value' would give wrong ranking due to unit differences.

pairs.question: List all BioTech stocks which has the same auditor as stock 6160 Beone Medicines
pairs.sql: SELECT c.stock_code, c.name_en, c.auditor FROM companies c WHERE c.sector = 'BioTech' AND c.auditor = (SELECT auditor FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '6160') ORDER BY c.stock_code;

pairs.question: Please provide all the ultimate controlling shareholders of each BioTech stock
pairs.sql: SELECT stock_code, name_en, name_zh, ultimate_controlling_shareholder FROM companies WHERE sector = 'BioTech' AND ultimate_controlling_shareholder IS NOT NULL ORDER BY stock_code;

pairs.question: List all BioTech companies which has a Qualified Opinion from auditor's opinion
pairs.sql: SELECT stock_code, name_en, name_zh, auditor, auditor_opinion FROM companies WHERE sector = 'BioTech' AND auditor_opinion = 'Qualified' ORDER BY stock_code;

pairs.question: Find the Top 2 BioTech stocks with the highest total liabilities in 2024 and show their closing price in 2022
pairs.sql: SELECT c.stock_code, c.name_en, fm.standardized_value as total_liabilities_2024, fm.standardized_currency, m.trade_date, m.closing_price FROM companies c JOIN financial_metrics fm ON c.id = fm.company_id JOIN market_data m ON c.id = m.company_id WHERE c.sector = 'BioTech' AND fm.metric_name = 'Total Liabilities' AND fm.year = 2024 AND fm.fiscal_period = 'FY' AND m.trade_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31' ORDER BY fm.standardized_value DESC LIMIT 100;
pairs.note: Uses standardized_value for ranking. Must GROUP BY standardized_currency if mixing currencies.

pairs.question: Plot the line chart of the closing price and transaction volume for stock 09969 in 2022
pairs.sql: SELECT trade_date, closing_price, trading_volume FROM market_data WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '09969') AND trade_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31' ORDER BY trade_date;

pairs.question: What is the total revenue of stock 09969 in 2023 & 2024 and what is the average trading volume in 2022?
pairs.sql: SELECT 'Revenue' as metric, year, value, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '09969') AND metric_name ILIKE '%revenue%' AND year IN (2023, 2024) AND fiscal_period = 'FY' UNION ALL SELECT 'Avg Volume' as metric, 2022 as year, AVG(trading_volume) as value, 'shares' as unit FROM market_data WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '09969') AND trade_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31';

pairs.question: What is the total revenue of stock 09969 in 2023 and 2024
pairs.sql: SELECT year, value as total_revenue, unit FROM financial_metrics WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '09969') AND metric_name ILIKE '%total revenue%' AND year IN (2023, 2024) AND fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY year;

pairs.question: What is the average trading volume for stock 09969 in 2022
pairs.sql: SELECT AVG(trading_volume) as avg_volume FROM market_data WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '09969') AND trade_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31';

pairs.question: List all BioTech stocks in 2024 which principal bankers are HSBC
pairs.sql: SELECT stock_code, name_en, name_zh, principal_banker FROM companies WHERE sector = 'BioTech' AND principal_banker ILIKE '%HSBC%' ORDER BY stock_code;

pairs.question: Show average closing price for BioTech stocks with HSBC as principal banker in 2022
pairs.sql: SELECT c.stock_code, c.name_en, AVG(m.closing_price) as avg_closing_price FROM companies c JOIN market_data m ON c.id = m.company_id WHERE c.sector = 'BioTech' AND c.principal_banker ILIKE '%HSBC%' AND m.trade_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31' GROUP BY c.stock_code, c.name_en ORDER BY avg_closing_price DESC;

pairs.question: What is the company's strategy on Artificial Intelligence or AI?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%Artificial Intelligence%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '% AI %' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%machine learning%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%人工智能%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Did the report mention anything about ESG policies?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%ESG%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%Environmental, Social, and Governance%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%sustainability%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%可持續%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Find all index reports for quarter Q3
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, index_theme, confirmed_industry FROM documents WHERE is_index_report = TRUE AND dynamic_attributes->>'index_quarter' = 'Q3';

pairs.question: List all documents with base_date in 2024
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, dynamic_attributes->>'base_date' as base_date FROM documents WHERE dynamic_attributes ? 'base_date' AND dynamic_attributes->>'base_date' LIKE '2024%';

pairs.question: Show all Hang Seng Biotech Index constituent companies
pairs.sql: SELECT dc.company_name, dc.stock_code, dc.assigned_industry, d.index_theme FROM document_companies dc JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id WHERE d.index_theme ILIKE '%Biotech%' AND d.is_index_report = TRUE ORDER BY dc.stock_code;

pairs.question: Find companies with Biotech in their AI suggested industries
pairs.sql: SELECT dc.company_name, dc.stock_code, dc.ai_suggested_industries, dc.industry_source FROM document_companies dc WHERE dc.ai_suggested_industries ? 'Biotech' AND dc.industry_source = 'ai_extracted';

pairs.question: List all annual reports for Tencent Holdings
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, parent_company, dynamic_attributes->>'report_year' as year FROM documents WHERE parent_company ILIKE '%Tencent%' AND report_type = 'annual_report' ORDER BY created_at DESC;

pairs.question: Show documents pending human review
pairs.sql: SELECT d.filename, rq.review_type, rq.confidence, rq.reason FROM documents d JOIN review_queue rq ON d.id = rq.document_id WHERE rq.status = 'pending' ORDER BY rq.created_at DESC;

pairs.question: What are the risk factors mentioned in the report?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%risk factor%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%主要風險%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%uncertainty%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%風險因素%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: What is the company's vision or future outlook?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%vision%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%outlook%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%future%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%展望%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%願景%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Does the company have any carbon emission or climate change initiatives?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%carbon%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%emission%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%climate change%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%碳排放%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%氣候變化%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: What digital transformation initiatives has the company undertaken?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%digital transformation%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%數碼轉型%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%數字化%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Find information about dividend policy
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%dividend%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%股息%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%派息%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: What is mentioned about cyber security?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%cyber security%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%cybersecurity%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%網絡安全%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%信息安全%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Does the report discuss any merger and acquisition activities?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%merger%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%acquisition%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%M&A%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%收購%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%合併%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: What is the company's approach to corporate governance?
pairs.sql: SELECT page_num, markdown_content FROM document_pages WHERE company_id = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE stock_code = '00001') AND (markdown_content ILIKE '%corporate governance%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%企業管治%' OR markdown_content ILIKE '%公司治理%') LIMIT 5;

pairs.question: Find all index reports for quarter Q3
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, index_theme, confirmed_industry FROM documents WHERE is_index_report = TRUE AND dynamic_attributes->>'index_quarter' = 'Q3';
pairs.note: Uses JSONB -> operator to query dynamic attribute 'index_quarter'

pairs.question: List all documents with a specific dynamic attribute key
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, dynamic_attributes->>'index_quarter' as quarter FROM documents WHERE dynamic_attributes ? 'index_quarter';
pairs.note: Uses JSONB ? operator to check if key exists

pairs.question: Find documents that mention Biotech in their AI-extracted industries
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, ai_extracted_industries FROM documents WHERE ai_extracted_industries ? 'Biotech';
pairs.note: Uses JSONB ? operator to query array values

pairs.question: List all companies from the Hang Seng Biotech Index report
pairs.sql: SELECT dc.company_name, dc.stock_code, dc.assigned_industry, dc.industry_source FROM document_companies dc JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id WHERE d.index_theme = 'Hang Seng Biotech Index';
pairs.note: Rule A: all companies have assigned_industry = 'Biotech' with industry_source = 'confirmed'

pairs.question: Show documents where industry was confirmed (Rule A applied)
pairs.sql: SELECT d.filename, d.confirmed_industry, d.index_theme, COUNT(dc.id) as company_count FROM documents d JOIN document_companies dc ON d.id = dc.document_id WHERE dc.industry_source = 'confirmed' GROUP BY d.id, d.filename, d.confirmed_industry, d.index_theme;
pairs.note: Rule A: industry_source = 'confirmed' means forced industry assignment

pairs.question: Show documents where industry was AI-extracted (Rule B applied)
pairs.sql: SELECT d.filename, dc.company_name, dc.ai_suggested_industries, dc.assigned_industry FROM documents d JOIN document_companies dc ON d.id = dc.document_id WHERE dc.industry_source = 'ai_extracted';
pairs.note: Rule B: industry_source = 'ai_extracted' means AI suggested industries

pairs.question: Show all pending reviews for uncertain AI decisions
pairs.sql: SELECT rq.id, d.filename, rq.review_type, rq.ai_suggestion, rq.confidence, rq.reason FROM review_queue rq JOIN documents d ON rq.document_id = d.id WHERE rq.status = 'pending' ORDER BY rq.confidence ASC;

pairs.question: Check the processing status of a document
pairs.sql: SELECT d.filename, dph.stage, dph.status, dph.metadata, dph.created_at FROM document_processing_history dph JOIN documents d ON dph.document_id = d.id WHERE d.filename = 'hsi_biotech_q3_2024.pdf' ORDER BY dph.created_at DESC;

pairs.question: What dynamic attribute keys are available in documents?
pairs.sql: SELECT DISTINCT jsonb_object_keys(dynamic_attributes) AS key, COUNT(*) as usage_count FROM documents WHERE dynamic_attributes IS NOT NULL GROUP BY jsonb_object_keys(dynamic_attributes) ORDER BY usage_count DESC;
pairs.note: Discover all available dynamic attribute keys for Just-in-Time Schema Injection

pairs.question: Summarize all index reports by theme and quarter
pairs.sql: SELECT index_theme, dynamic_attributes->>'index_quarter' as quarter, COUNT(*) as document_count, confirmed_industry FROM documents WHERE is_index_report = TRUE GROUP BY index_theme, dynamic_attributes->>'index_quarter', confirmed_industry ORDER BY document_count DESC;
pairs.note: Uses JSONB -> operator to extract quarter for grouping

pairs.question: Find which documents contain a specific company
pairs.sql: SELECT d.filename, d.report_type, d.index_theme, dc.assigned_industry, dc.industry_source FROM documents d JOIN document_companies dc ON d.id = dc.document_id WHERE dc.company_name ILIKE '%Tencent%' OR dc.stock_code = '00700';

pairs.question: Show me all documents
pairs.sql: SELECT * FROM v_documents_for_vanna ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC;
pairs.note: 使用 Vanna 專用視圖，自動展平 JSONB 屬性

pairs.question: Find companies in a specific industry
pairs.sql: SELECT * FROM v_companies_for_vanna WHERE primary_industry = '{industry}';
pairs.note: 使用 Vanna 專用視圖，已自動處理雙軌制行業邏輯 (confirmed_industry vs AI extracted)

pairs.question: What companies are mentioned in this document?
pairs.sql: SELECT c.name_en, c.stock_code, dc.relation_type, dc.extracted_industries FROM document_companies dc JOIN companies c ON dc.company_id = c.id JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id WHERE d.filename ILIKE '%{filename}%';
pairs.note: 查詢特定文檔中提及的關聯公司

pairs.question: Find all companies in the Biotech industry
pairs.sql: SELECT name_en, stock_code FROM v_companies_for_vanna WHERE primary_industry ILIKE '%Biotech%';
pairs.note: ⭐ 使用新視圖查詢行業，自動解決雙軌制問題

pairs.question: Show all Hang Seng Biotech Index constituent companies
pairs.sql: SELECT c.name_en, c.stock_code, dc.extracted_industries FROM document_companies dc JOIN v_documents_for_vanna d ON dc.document_id = d.id JOIN v_companies_for_vanna c ON dc.company_id = c.id WHERE d.doc_theme ILIKE '%Biotech Index%' AND dc.relation_type = 'index_constituent';
pairs.note: 使用 relation_type 過濾指數成分股

pairs.question: List all annual reports for Tencent Holdings
pairs.sql: SELECT filename, year FROM v_documents_for_vanna WHERE owner_company_name_en ILIKE '%Tencent%' AND report_type = 'annual_report';
pairs.note: ⭐ 使用新視圖查詢母公司的文檔
